request_payload.exposure_text: As a mother, I can't ignore what's happening at our borders. My daughter's school has had to add ESL classes because of the overwhelming number of unaccompanied minors being placed in local schools. It's not that I'm against immigration - I'm first-generation myself! - but we can't keep having our communities strained like this. Stronger border enforcement isn't about being heartless, it's about being responsible. How many more schools and hospitals will be overwhelmed before we take action?
